system.Text:
__When you are in control and take action in a fight to reinforce your position or move toward an objective__, envision your approach and roll. If you are...

  * In pursuit, fleeing, or maneuvering: Roll +edge
  * Leading the charge, aiding others, negotiating, or commanding: Roll +heart
  * Leverage with force, powering through, or making threats: Roll +iron
  * Hiding, preparing an ambush, or misdirecting: Roll +shadow
  * Coordinating plans, studying a situation, or cleverly gaining leverage: Roll +wits

On a __hit__, you stay in control. On a __strong hit__, choose two. On a __weak hit__, choose one.

  * Mark progress
  * Take +2 momentum
  * Add +1 on your next move (not a progress move)

On a __miss__, your foe gains the upper hand, the fight moves to a new location, or you encounter a new peril. You are in a bad spot and must @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.78baa51694fe37c5]{Pay the Price}.

Trigger.Text: When you are in control and take action in a fight to reinforce your position or move toward an objective...

Options.Text: Leading the charge, aiding others, negotiating, or commanding
Leveraging force, powering through, or making threats
Hiding, preparing an ambush, or misdirecting
Coordinating plans, studying a situation, or cleverly gaining leverage

Strong Hit.Text:
On a __strong hit__, you stay in control. Choose two.

  * Mark progress
  * Take +2 momentum
  * Add +1 on your next move (not a progress move)

Weak Hit.Text:
On a __weak hit__, you stay in control. Choose one.

  * Mark progress
  * Take +2 momentum
  * Add +1 on your next move (not a progress move)

Miss.Text: On a __miss__, your foe gains the upper hand, the fight moves to a new location, or you encounter a new peril. You are in a bad spot and must @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.78baa51694fe37c5]{Pay the Price}.
